security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' tauri:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' tauri: https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' tauri: data: blob:; media-src 'self' tauri: blob:; connect-src 'self' tauri: ipc: https:
